name: My Love Mix-Up!
overview: Aoki has a crush on Hashimoto, the girl in the seat next to him in class. But he despairs when he borrows her eraser and sees she's written the name of another boy—Ida—on it. To make matters more confusing, Ida sees Aoki holding that very eraser and thinks Aoki has a crush on him!

trailers.title: [Japanese BL] Vanishing My First Love [Teaser] (ENG SUB)
